
## GitHub Discussions Roundup (The Gymnastics Instructor)
**Date (JST):** 2026-06-07

Alright! How’s everyone doing!?
It rained in Matsudo yesterday, didn’t it? When you’re jumping around outside, be careful of the puddles!

Anyway, here’s a recap of yesterday’s GitHub Discussions!
In response to the question, “Who is Haruharu?”, we received a very powerful answer: “He’s an ordinary guy who handles software, hardware, and infrastructure operations!”

……Wait, what!? Hold on a sec!
That’s way too broad a scope for an “ordinary guy”!
That sounds like a superhero who’s handling multiple roles all by himself! (lol)

I wonder if he’ll use the power of technology to make everyone smile? I’m really looking forward to it!

Today’s Tip: Even if you can do a lot, don’t overdo it!
